goal: Add a public privacy policy page (required for App Store Connect privacy-policy URL)
done: New /privacy.html + /th/privacy.html, self-contained on-brand pages (Cormorant/DM Sans EN, Noto Serif Thai/IBM Plex Sans Thai TH) covering on-device data, Google/Apple sign-in data, GA4 analytics, sub-processors, and in-app account deletion. hreflang-linked EN<->TH. Linked from the profile Account card.
verified: Rendered both at 390px in chrome harness — on-brand, Thai no tofu, lang toggles work.
notes: Contact email is hello@meowtarot.com — user must confirm that inbox exists.

goal: Native Google + Apple sign-in for the Capacitor iOS app (webview blocks Google OAuth; Apple required by Guideline 4.8)
done: js/auth.js: isNativePlatform() gate; native Google via system browser (@capacitor/browser open + @capacitor/app appUrlOpen deep-link redirect -> exchangeCodeForSession/setSession); native Apple via @capacitor-community/apple-sign-in -> signInWithIdToken with SHA-256 nonce. Web path unchanged. Sign-in gate shows a black Apple button on native only. Registered custom URL scheme com.meowtarot.app:// in Info.plist CFBundleURLTypes. Bundled 3 plugins into js/vendor/ via esbuild; cap sync registered all 4 in SPM.
verified: node --check passes all JS; plist lints OK; cap sync found 4 plugins incl apple-sign-in@7.1.0. NOT yet device-tested (needs Apple Developer signing + Supabase Apple provider config).
notes: apple-sign-in is v7 (no Cap8 release yet) — watch for an SPM/build warning in Xcode. Native OAuth needs user-side: Supabase Apple provider + redirect-URL allowlist (com.meowtarot.app://auth-callback), Apple Developer Sign in with Apple capability.

done: supabase/functions/delete-account/index.ts: service-role edge function that identifies caller from JWT, purges reading_cards (via their readings), readings, user_progress, ladder_b, users, then auth.admin.deleteUser. js/auth.js deleteAccount() invokes it + logout. Profile Account card: two-step inline Delete-account confirm (EN/TH) + privacy-policy link. New i18n keys in common.js.
verified: node --check passes; UI logic two-step confirm. Edge function NOT yet deployed (user runs supabase functions deploy delete-account).
